corrections.note: The word 'εἶ' is duplicated in the transcription.
The siglum ℵ indicating the Sinaiticus recension was misread as the word 'ἰς'.
The initial kappa should be a chi.
The word ἔστω was transcribed instead of ἔστιν.
The phrase 'εὐλογητὸν τὸ ὄνομά' was misread as 'εὐλογησάτωσάν'.
The word ἀποβῆναί was transcribed instead of ἀπολυθῆναί.
The word ἀκοῦσόν was transcribed instead of ἀκούειν.
The phrase 'εἰσάκουσον ὀνειδισμὸν' was transcribed as 'ἐπίβλεψον'.

corrections.current: αδους] κ* (αδου ℵc.a) γης sup ras ℵ1 | μοις να] νος ναι] sup ras A | αυτην ℵ* (εμαυτην ℵc.a) | αυτω γυ sup ras ℵ1 | αυτω γυναι sup ras A (seq ras 2 litt) | κα (προ κα κε) ℵc edit
corrections.correct: αδους ℵ* (αδου ℵc.a) γης sup ras ℵa | 14 υιος ινα] υιος ι sup ras Aa | αυτην ℵ* (εμαυτην ℵc.a) | 15 της αιχμ.] om της A | υιος ινα] υιος ι sup ras ℵa | αυτω γυναι sup ras Aa (seq ras 2 litt) | κα (pro κε) ℵc.edit
corrections.note: The apparatus transcription for vv. 10-15 is heavily corrupted with misread sigla, misread words, missing entries, and fabricated entries. Correcting as a single block.
The siglum ℵs was misread as κs.

notes: This page contains the dual recension of Tobit (B-text and S-text). The transcription of the apparatus was particularly poor, with numerous errors, omissions, and misreadings.
